title: Better Bundle
description: Bundles have been enhanced! They can now carry up to 27 stacks of mixed items, making them the ultimate storage solution!
body:
# Better Bundle V1.5 > **Bundles** have been **enhanced!** They **can** now **carry up** to **27 stacks** of **mixed items**, making them the **ultimate storage solution!** **This presentation refers to the latest Data Pack release: Version 1.5.x.** For previous releases, check the "_Older Versions_" section at the bottom of the page. # 📥How to Install Choose if you want to download the pure **Data Pack** version or the **Mod** version and follow the steps accordingly.
Data Pack * **1)** Download the Datapack * **2)** Chose the world you want to install the Data Pack in and navigate to its "_datapacks_" folder * **3)** Copy the downloaded Data Pack file (Better Bundle) into this folder * **4)** Join the world and run /reload command
Mod * **1)** Download the Mod * **2)** Navigate to your mods folder (_for the vanilla launcher the path is_ .minecraft/mods) * **3)** Put the downloaded .jar file (Better Bundle) into this folder * **4)** Join the world and run /reload command ### The Mod version of this Data Pack is compatibile with Fabric, Forge, Quilt and NeoForge **Note**: _support for NeoForge is available starting from version **1.5** of the pack_
# 📖Features The bundles have been improved and they can now **carry up to 27 stacks** of items including **stackable, non-stackable** and even **shulker boxes**! ![Bundles Compatibility](https://i.imgur.com/EMnM7zz.png) ## **Use** the **bundle expanded capacity** - **Fill a bundle**: Put the **items** you **want to transfer** into a **chest**, then hold an **empty bundle** in your **main-hand**, and **right-click** on the chest to **transfer** its **content** into the **bundle**. - **Empty a bundle**: To take items out of a bundle, you can: - **Scroll Functionality (vanilla 1.21.2+)**: Use the mouse wheel to scroll through the items and take out the one you want. - **Quickly deposit items into an empty chest**: Hold a filled bundle (with this pack) in your **off-hand**, keep your **main-hand empty**, and **right-click** on an **empty chest** to transfer all the **bundle's contents** into that **chest**.
Bundle Crafting Recipe ![Bundle Crafting Recipe (all variants)](https://i.imgur.com/xd5oNpN.gif) ### ❗Note❗ both the normal and trapped chest can be used in the crafting recipe.
YouTube Showcase
# 📤How to Uninstall
Data Pack To uninstall the **Data Pack version** you can just run /function bundle:uninstall command. When the uninstallation process is completed a confirmation message will be sent in the chat.
Mod To uninstall the **Mod version** you need to run /function bundle:uninstall command. Then you close the game and remove the **jar** file from your .minecraft/mods folder.
## 🔗External links ## 📜Older Versions
Version 1.4 and below for Minecraft 1.19-1.21.1 # 📖Features The bundle has been improved and it can now carry **27 item slots** including **stackable and non-stackable** items and **even shulker boxes**. - To put items inside a bundle, hold an empty bundle in your main hand and right click on a chest to transfer its content into the bundle. - To empty a bundle, hold it in your off hand, don't hold anything in your main hand and right click on an empty chest to transfer all the bundle content into the chest.
Youtube ShowCase
Bundle Crafting Recipes             **❗Note❗** Both the normal and trapped chest can be used in the crafting recipe.
